verses.text: Israel mite aw, kap kawmin kong thugenna, limtakin ngai un
Nungak Israel puk khin a, thokik ngei nawnlo ding hi. Leilakah lum dildel a, a phongto ding kuamah omlo hi

Tua ahih manin Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Israel khuapi khat in galkap tul khat kuankhiasak a, ahi zongin za khat bek hong ciahkik hi. Khuapi dang khat in galkap za khat kuankhiasak a, ahi zongin sawm khat bek hong ciahkik hi
Tua ahih manin Topa in Israel mite tungah hih bangin ci hi: Kei hong zong un; tua hi leh na nungta ding uh hi
A bia dingin Beersheba-ah pai kei un. Bethel-ah kei hong zong kei un; a mawkna suak ding hi. Gilgal-ah zong lut kei un; Gilgal mite, sal a suak ding hi lel hi

Topa zong un; tua hi leh na nungta ding uh hi. Amah na zon kei uh leh Josef mite tungah meikuang bangin amah hong kuang ding a, tua mei in Bethel-a om mite kangtumin, tua mei a phelh ding kuamah omlo ding hi
Thutang lumletin thuman mite lei a den'na, note-a' dingin bangzahin nasia ding ahi hiam
Vana om aksi Seguk leh Zawlzawngte bawlin, khuamial pen khuavak suaksak a, sun pen zan suaksakin, tuipi panin tuite samkhia a, leitungah tua tui a buakhiapa a min pen Topa ahi hi
Amah in kulh muan'huaite leh munmuan'huaite thakhatin susia thei hi
Note in thukhen zumah thutang a deihpa na mudah uh a, thuman a genpa na hua uh hi

Note in mizawngte tuancilin, a an neihteng khempeuh uh laksak na hih manun, suangseek inn na lam hangun tua suang innsungah na tengkha kei ding uh a, leenggui lo hoih na neih hangun a leenggahzu na dawnkha kei ding uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh na khialhna tampite uh leh na mawhna tampite uh a vekin ka thei khin hi. Thuman mite gimsakin, sumgolh na la uh a, thukhenna zumah mizawngte' thu a manin na khen kei uh hi
Tua ahih manin hih bang hunsiat hun laitakin thu ngaihsun thei mite, pauloin a om khikhe, lamdang sak ding hilo hi
Note na nuntak theihna dingun siatna gamta loin, thumanin gamtat ding hanciam un. Tua hi leh na gensa uh mah bangin Topa, Vanglian Pasian in note hong ompih ding hi
Thusia mudahin thupha deih un la, thukhen zumah a manin thu khen un. Tua hi leh Josef minam a suakta sunte tungah Topa, Vanglian Pasian hong thunuam khathei ding hi

Tua ahih ciangin Topa, Vanglian Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: Mihon omna lamkabom khempeuhah mite in na sa-in thumin tau ding uh a, kongzing khempeuhah kap ding uh hi. Khuaneu-a mite a thum dingin kisam ding a, a kah siam mite a kap dingin kicial ding hi
Note gim a pia dingin hong pai ding ka hih manin leenggui lo khempeuhah kahna aw ging ding hi, Topa in ci hi
Topa' ni hong tun' ding a ngaklah note-a' dingin bangzah takin lauhuai ding ahi hiam? Note-a' dingin tua ni a hoihna hong om ding ahi hiam? Tua ni pen lungzin' ni hi a, lungtaii ni hilo hi
Humpinelkai kihta-in vompi a tuakpa tawh kibang ding hi. Tua ahih kei leh mi khat a inn-ah hong tai a, a kawmah a khut a ngak ciangin gul in a tuk tawh kibang ding hi
Topa' ni pen khuavak ni hiloin khuamial ni hi a, maitaina a omlo lungzin' ni ahi hi
Na biakna pawite uh mudahin ka deih kei a, na biak kikhopnate uhah ka lung a kim kei hi
Meihal biakna leh an tawh biakna nong paipih uh hangin tuate kong sang kei ding hi. Thunuama biakpiakna dingin na hong paipih uh a thau mahmah ganhingte zong et-in ka nei vet kei ding hi
La sa-in na gamlumnate uh khawl un; na lasakna uh a gingte ka za nuam kei hi
Thutang, tui bangin luangkhiasak un la, thuman, a kang ngeilo tui bangin luangsak un
Israel mite aw, gamlakah kum sawmli na om sungun gan go-a biakna leh keima tungah piakna bangmah nong bawl kei uh hi
Tua hinapi tu-in note-a' dingin na bawltawm uh aksi pasian-te ahi Sakkuth leh Kaivuan milimte na biak manun
Damaskas khengin gamdang khatah sal dingin note kong paisak ding hi, Vanglian Pasian min a nei Topa in ci hi.
